title: iam_binding
description: One (role, principal) IAM binding — GCP project-level IAM policy binding, AWS managed-policy attachment to a principal, Azure role assignment. One record per (role, member/principal) pair. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for least-privilege and separation-of-duties checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier composed from role + principal (e.g. 'roles/owner|user:alice@example.com').

principal_id.description: Principal identifier (email, ARN, username, or group name).

is_broad_admin_role.description: Role grants account-wide or project-wide admin privileges (e.g. roles/owner, AdministratorAccess).

has_condition.description: Binding is subject to a condition/expression that restricts its scope.
